svg.text: Find engineers by what they've actually built —
Paste a job description. AI generates a full sourcing
strategy: target repos, companies, skills & EEA signals.
Find real GitHub contributors. AI scores them 0-100
and surfaces hidden gems others miss entirely.
LinkedIn lookup via Exa semantic search.
Discover contact info, emails & social profiles.
AI writes personalized messages referencing the
candidate's actual open-source work and commits.
Compare, rank & draft outreach for multiple
candidates with an AI-powered chat interface.
